activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
Connection goods description and origin for multiple origins

consignor.certificate_value:
Berg Prop Prod. AB
Tärnvägen 15
SE-475 40, HÖNÖ
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Berg Propulsion Production AB
Box 1005
475 22 ÖCKERÖ
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor name 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is found in the invoice as 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' in various address blocks including mailing and visiting address, indicating the same legal entity based on allowed rules for commercial name variants and address consistency. The country Sweden matches exactly after normalization. Thus, consignor is matched according to rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.4 and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value:
BERG Propulsion Shanghai
Room1704, Xu Hui Wan Ke Centre
Lee Kun Kee Plaza
No 970, Nanning Road
Shanghai P.R.C 200235
China
consignee.invoice_value:
BERG Propulsion Shanghai
Rm. 1704, Xu Hui Wan Ke Center Lee Kun Kee Plaza, No.970, Nanning Road,
Shanghai, 200235
PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' is explicitly found in the invoice's delivery address and mailing address as 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' with same detailed address and country People's Republic of China. The company name matches after allowed normalizations. Country 'China' [certificate] corresponds to 'People's Republic of China' [invoice] following normalization rules including China/Hong Kong equivalence. Thus consignee matches per rules 4.2.0, 4.2.2.1 and 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value:
SHIP SPARES 1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg
According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806
goods_description.invoice_value:
Multiple line items with part numbers (e.g., KU32222, KU29334) and detailed product names matching 'SHIP SPARES' general description
Order number S7081TR806
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with explicit reference to attached invoice and order number S7081TR806 (rule 4.3.5). Invoice contains detailed product descriptions and part numbers matching the general description. Multiple origins in certificate matched with corresponding country of origin per item in invoice (rule 4.3.7). Goods description verified by invoice reference.

quantity.invoice_value: Multiple detailed quantities per part number totaling to shipment quantity 1 pcs
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity is '1 pcs' treated as shipment quantity, which matches the invoice context. The invoice lists multiple parts with individual quantities, consistent with overall shipment. This is acceptable under rule 4.4.3.2 for shipment quantity verification. No contradictory quantities present.

origin.invoice_value: Multiple country of origin entries per part, including Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, United Kingdom, Taiwan, The Netherlands, China; explicit country of origin fields present
origin.motivation: Certificate indicates origin as 'EU' with listed countries China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan. Invoice shows explicit country of origin fields with multiple countries including Sweden (EU member), Germany (EU member), Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan and The Netherlands (EU member). All certificate countries are identifiable in invoice with allowed EU normalization and China/Hong Kong equivalence. The presence of EU and named countries aligns with rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2. China/Hong Kong equivalence rule 4.6 accepted. Therefore origin is matched.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin have been successfully matched between the certificate and the invoice without discrepancies or ambiguities. The presence of an explicit invoice reference in the certificate supports verification of general goods description. Multiple origins in certificate and invoice align following EU normalization rules. Therefore, the documents can be auto-approved without manual handling.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
